mentions.author: Guiyun Wang, Jinke Kuang, Yanxia Qi, Jingya Li
mentions.content_english: Researchers compared how well TikTok and Bilibili handle videos about teen depression, looking at whether the information shared on these platforms is actually accurate and helpful for young people.
mentions.content_original: Information quality of videos related to adolescent depression on social media platforms: a comparative study of TikTok and BiliBili. Videos on adolescent depression are disseminated through TikTok and Bilibili, both of which have gained popularity in recent years as easily accessible platforms.

mentions.author: cyber.sports.ru
mentions.content_english: Bilibili Gaming are playing Top Esports in an upcoming LPL match, and analysts think BLG looks like the stronger team right now despite a couple recent losses, while Top has been shaky lately.
mentions.content_original: 16 апреля в формате BO-3 состоится матч между Top Esports и Bilibili Gaming. Top Esports имеют отличный опыт на этом турнире, но в последних встречах они показывают некоторую нестабильность. В свою очередь, Bilibili Gaming продолжают демонстрировать хороший уровень игры, несмотря на пару недавних поражений.

mentions.author: Tit Krajnik
mentions.content_english: Esports fans are hyped for an upcoming League of Legends showdown between Top Esports and Bilibili Gaming, with BLG sitting undefeated so far this season and looking like the team to beat.
mentions.content_original: Top Esports and Bilibili Gaming are set to clash on April 16, 2026, in an exciting LPL Split 2 matchup. Top Esports boast a solid 3-1 record despite recent roster changes, showing promise with three consecutive wins. Meanwhile, Bilibili Gaming remains undefeated at 3-0, showcasing strategic prowess.

mentions.author: Sofascore
mentions.content_english: Bilibili Gaming lost to JD Gaming 1-2 in their Esports World Cup Phase 2 League of Legends matchup.
mentions.content_original: Bilibili Gaming – JD Gaming match starts on 13 Apr 2026 at 09:00 UTC in Esports World Cup Phase 2 – LoL. Bilibili Gaming 1 - 2 JD Gaming Finished.

mentions.author: Gentlemen Marketing Agency
mentions.content_english: Bilibili hit 366 million monthly active users in 2025, with people spending almost 2 hours a day on the app—massive engagement numbers that show how dominant the platform is for reaching young audiences in China.
mentions.content_original: According to Bilibili's Q4 2025 financial results reported by Sahm Capital, the platform reached 366 million monthly active users by the end of 2025, with each user spending an average of 107 minutes per day on the app.

mentions.author: MarketScreener
mentions.content_english: Bilibili is raising $500 million through convertible bonds, a financial move that shows the company is looking to fund future growth and projects.
mentions.content_original: Bilibili planea una oferta de bonos convertibles por valor de 500 millones de dólares

mentions.author: aibase.com
mentions.content_english: Bilibili just open-sourced a cutting-edge AI model for creating anime and animation videos, and people in the AI community are excited about what this means for anime creators.
mentions.content_original: Built for Anime! Bilibili Opensources SOTA Animation Video Generation Model Index-AniSora

mentions.author: Tit Krajnik
mentions.content_english: Bilibili Gaming is facing off against Titan Esports Club in the VALORANT Champions Tour, and even though BLG's start has been a bit rocky, experts think they'll still crush this matchup.
mentions.content_original: Bilibili Gaming and Titan Esports Club are set to clash in the second week of the VALORANT Champions Tour 2026 China Stage 1. Although Bilibili Gaming, a top contender in Chinese esports, hasn't had the smoothest start, they are expected to dominate the matchup against TEC.

mentions.author: Victor Hale
mentions.content_english: Bilibili just scrapped its old 'Guess You Like' recommendation system and rolled out a brand new algorithm. Some users are excited about better content discovery, while others worry it might mess up their feeds.
mentions.content_original: On April 1, Bilibili replaced its long-standing 'Guess You Like' homepage recommendation system with a new algorithm. The overhaul aims to close the engagement gap, but the market questions whether it can succeed before investor confidence wanes.

mentions.author: BibiGPT Team
mentions.content_english: Bilibili users looking for AI video summaries have a clear winner: BibiGPT actually works with B站, while Microsoft Copilot doesn't support Chinese video platforms at all. BibiGPT is built specifically for creators who watch Bilibili, TikTok, and other Chinese platforms, making it way more useful if that's where you spend your time.
mentions.content_original: Microsoft CopilotはBilibili（ビリビリ）やDouyin（抖音）などの中国動画プラットフォームを要約できますか？答えはノーです — CopilotはYouTube（Edgeブラウザー）とTeams会議録音のみに対応。YouTube・Bilibili・ポッドキャストなど複数プラットフォームのコンテンツを処理したいユーザーには、BibiGPTが30以上のプラットフォーム対応とネイティブ多言語出力でより包括的な選択肢です。

mentions.author: Tit Krajnik
mentions.content_english: Bilibili Gaming are the defending champs heading into the new League of Legends season in China, and they're favored to win it again — but they've got tough competition coming from other top teams.
mentions.content_original: The LPL 2026 Split 2 promises an electrifying season as the second split of China's League of Legends Pro League gears up. Bilibili Gaming, reigning champions, aim to maintain their dominance but face fierce competition from teams like Anyone's Legend and Top Esports. With betting opportunities galore, fans can engage with the action on platforms like Stake, offering competitive odds and live streaming.

mentions.author: Lauren Mitchell
mentions.content_english: People worry about whether Bilibili is actually safe to use, especially when it comes to data privacy and security. Users want to know if a VPN is needed to stream safely.
mentions.content_original: Is Bilibili safe? With geo-blocking, data collection concerns, and security risks, many users wonder whether they need a VPN to access Bilibili safely. The platform collects personal data and some regions face access restrictions.

mentions.author: dadashuai
mentions.content_english: Users are excited about a fan-made Bilibili music player called Biu that works on phones, tablets, and cars without paying for premium. Someone ported the desktop app to Android so people can finally listen to music on the go using Bilibili as the source.
mentions.content_original: 可以在汽车上播放的B站音乐播放器！！！一直以来我没有在汽车上听歌，因为不想付费。。。突然有一天逛论坛发现了Biu这个软件，这个软件是用electron写的桌面程序，于是我想把它移植到安卓上。

mentions.author: 网易订阅
mentions.content_english: Bilibili's AniSora V3 just dropped a major update, and anime creators are hyped—the new version can boost team productivity by 3-5x. But people are also worried about potential copyright issues with AI-generated characters.
mentions.content_original: Bilibili宣布其开源动漫视频生成模型AniSora V3迎来重大更新，该版本基于CogVideoX-5B和Wan2.1-14B模型，结合强化学习与人类反馈（RLHF）框架，支持多种动漫风格的视频生成，为创作者提供了更强大的工具。二次元内容团队产能提升3-5倍，但需警惕AI生成角色版权争议。

mentions.author: 52pojie.cn
mentions.content_english: Users are looking for a Bilibili creator's photography editing course, showing that Bilibili hosts educational content that people actively want to find and share.
mentions.content_original: 求B站熊熊Bearie的的LR课程（摄影后期调色：带你玩转Lightroom）

mentions.author: BibiGPT Team
mentions.content_english: Bilibili and other video platforms are getting tools that automatically chop up long videos into snappy short clips with AI-generated narration, making it way easier for creators to repurpose content for TikTok and short-form viewers.
mentions.content_original: 2026年、AI動画リミックスツールはコンテンツ制作の在り方を根本的に変えています。60分の講義録画、90分の会議映像、45分のYouTubeディープレビュー — これらの長尺動画には膨大な価値が含まれていますが、ほとんどの視聴者は最後まで見ません。真のチャンスは、AIを使って長尺動画を分解・再構成・アップグレードし、ショート動画プラットフォームに最適化された新しいコンテンツを作ることにあります。

mentions.author: Record China
mentions.content_english: Fans on Bilibili are voting for their favorite characters from new anime, with one female character getting surprising support that caught viewers off guard.
mentions.content_original: 2026年3月23日、中国のポータルサイト・捜狐に、中国の動画プラットフォーム・ビリビリ(bilib...続きを読む

mentions.author: Olivier VEROT
mentions.content_english: Brands are realizing Bilibili is where China's Gen Z actually hangs out, with over 80% of users under 35. The platform has become a goldmine for reaching young Chinese consumers through influencers and native ads.
mentions.content_original: With over 80% of Bilibili users being under 35, the platform has become a goldmine for brands targeting tech-savvy, trend-conscious consumers. Sparkle, Bilibili's official brand-creator matchmaking platform, provides KOL pricing, audience analytics, and campaign management across 27 industries.

mentions.author: John Popko
mentions.content_english: Esports fans are hyped — Bilibili Gaming just won their first-ever international League of Legends title at First Stand 2026, beating G2 Esports 3-1 in the grand final in Sao Paulo. Bin got MVP and the community is calling it a historic moment for the LPL.
mentions.content_original: Bilibili Gaming (BLG) won the 2026 First Stand tournament after defeating G2 Esports 3-1 in the grand final. Bin was named the Finals MVP for his impactful plays. Park 'Viper' Do-hyeon became the first two-time First Stand champion. BLG earned US$250,000.

mentions.author: Hal Iida
mentions.content_english: Bilibili Gaming finally won their first international esports title by beating G2 at First Stand 2026 in Brazil. Fans are celebrating BLG's massive achievement after years of trying to break through on the global stage.
mentions.content_original: 「First Stand 2026」で中国の「Bilibili Gaming」が優勝。初の国際タイトルを手にした。 BLGが「First Stand 2026」優勝！LECの星・G2を振り切り、LPLの強豪が"4度目の正直"で念願の国際タイトルを獲得【First Stand 2026】

mentions.author: leesojung
mentions.content_english: A Chinese court ruled against Bilibili in a major copyright lawsuit, finding the platform liable for knowingly allowing Korean broadcaster MBC's content to be spread illegally. The court significantly increased damages, saying Bilibili couldn't hide behind being just a user-upload platform.
mentions.content_original: MBCが中国の大手動画プラットフォームであるビリビリ（BiliBili）運営会社を相手に提起した著作権侵害損害賠償請求訴訟で、中国裁判所の最終判決を通じて勝訴しました。中国江蘇省高級人民法院は1審判決を一部変更し、プラットフォーム運営会社が侵害コンテンツの大量流通を認識しながら適切な措置を取らなかった点について、侵害幇助責任を認め、損害賠償範囲を大幅に引き上げて判決しました。

mentions.author: Michael "HoffaSaurusX" Hassall
mentions.content_english: Bilibili Gaming just dominated G2 Esports to win the First Stand 2026 championship 3-1, claiming their trophy in an epic League of Legends showdown between China and Europe.
mentions.content_original: The LPL's Bilibili Gaming has defeated the LEC's G2 Esports 3-1 to claim victory in First Stand 2026. The Chinese org lifted the trophy after an intense series on Sunday, March 22.

mentions.author: letemsvetemapplem.eu
mentions.content_english: Apple just made a big move into Bilibili, China's version of YouTube, and people are already noticing—their developer account got over 17,600 followers in just 13 hours after posting. The company is clearly preparing the ground for iOS 27 and trying to connect directly with Chinese developers and customers.
mentions.content_original: وقد دخلت الشركة رسميًا منصة Bilibili الشهيرة هناك، وهي بمثابة النسخة الصينية من YouTube. في غضون 13 ساعة فقط من التحميل الفيديو الأول وقد حصد الحساب المخصص للمطورين أكثر من 17600 متابع وآلاف الإعجابات.

mentions.author: Forbes JAPAN編集部
mentions.content_english: AI is making creative work easier for everyone, and professional studios are increasingly jumping on board—even Disney just invested a billion dollars in AI video tech, so expect way more AI-generated movies and anime to pop up soon.
mentions.content_original: AIの登場は、専門性をもたない人間にとってもクリエイティブ生成を容易にした非常に大きな革命でした。すでに多くの人がAIを活用して画像や動画などを生成していると思いますが、2026年以降はプロの制作現場におけるAI活用がますます促進されるでしょう。

mentions.author: Antonio Vallejo
mentions.content_english: Bilibili is gaining popularity with Gen Z audiences as a Chinese video platform that combines long-form video, live streaming, gaming content, and user-generated material in one ecosystem.
mentions.content_original: Bilibili es la principal casa en China para los vídeos de larga duración. Generalmente se suele comparar con YouTube, pero tiene una serie de características que le diferencian ampliamente de esta plataforma. Y es que Bilibili es una olla a presión donde se concentran las retransmisiones en directo, todo lo relacionado con el gaming, vídeos profesionales de larga duración o contenido generado por el usuario.

mentions.author: Oriental Daily via Daiwa
mentions.content_english: Wall Street is bullish on Bilibili's ad business—one major bank just bumped up their price target to $250. AI-related ad budgets are exploding, growing 180% year-over-year.
mentions.content_original: 大和在最新研究報告表示，睇好嗶哩嗶哩(09626)廣告收入增長前景，重申該股「買入」評級，目標價由245元上調至250元，相當於預測市盈率35倍。去年第四季廣告收入按年增長加速至27%，AI相關廣告預算在季內按年增長180%。

mentions.author: 彭偉新
mentions.content_english: Bilibili is crushing it with ads—over half their ads are now AI-generated, making them way more effective. The stock has solid technical momentum too, with big investors loading up on shares.
mentions.content_original: 截至2025年第三季度，集團的財務表現亮眼，Q3總收入76.9億元人民幣，同比增長5%；廣告收入增長23%至25.7億元；淨利潤4.694億元，實現連續盈利。超過50%的廣告素材由AI生成，智能廣告投放系統的引入進一步增強了投入產出比。
mentions.url: https://www.hk01.com/財經快訊/60310370/嗶哩嗶哩-9626-ai驅動廣告增-新遊戲催化及技術走勢轉強-彭偉新

mentions.author: Jon Cuthbert
mentions.content_english: Bilibili finally proved it's a real business—it went from burning cash to actually making money, and the ads are what's driving it all.
mentions.content_original: Bilibili (NASDAQ:BILI) has achieved its first-ever full year of GAAP profitability, marking a historic turning point for the youth-oriented video platform. The company's 2025 results, reported on March 5, 2026, highlighted a successful transition from high-growth cash burn to a sustainable, ad-driven business model.

mentions.author: videoconverterfactory.com
mentions.content_english: People are finding it tricky to download Bilibili videos in high quality — some videos have quality limits, membership is sometimes required, and recent site changes mean many downloader tools can only save at 480p max instead of the full 1080p.
mentions.content_original: bilibiliから高画質（1080P）で動画をダウンロードするのは、思っているほど簡単ではありません。動画によっては画質が制限されていたり、会員登録が必要だったりする場合もあります。ご注意：bilibiliサイト側の仕様変更により、現在多くの動画ダウンロードツールでは最高480pまでしか保存できない場合があります。

mentions.author: Shanghai Jungle
mentions.content_english: Gen Z guys in China are discovering skincare products on Bilibili and Douyin through short videos from influencers, making these platforms crucial for foreign brands trying to sell men's skincare to younger audiences.
mentions.content_original: Douyin and Bilibili are key platforms for reaching Gen Z male consumers in skincare. Short-form video content drives engagement and product discovery, with KOLs playing a central role in normalizing male skincare routines through authentic storytelling and product reviews.

mentions.author: AASTOCKS
mentions.content_english: Bilibili just showed off massive engagement numbers from their Spring Festival Gala broadcast—133 million bullet comments with users posting 7,700 comments per second—proving that live-commenting on Bilibili while watching the gala has become a core New Year's Eve tradition for young Chinese audiences.
mentions.content_original: Bilibili (B Station) (09626.HK) released data related to the live broadcast of the Spring Festival Gala in the Year of the Horse, showing that on New Year's Eve (16th), the total number of bullet comments during the live broadcast reached 133 million, with an average of 7,700 comments sent per second, indicating that sending bullet comments on Bilibili while watching the Spring Festival Gala has become an important ritual for young people on New Year's Eve

mentions.author: zhihu.com
mentions.content_english: People are asking how to get the best deals on Bilibili's membership plans. Users want to know which membership tier gives them better value — whether it's worth upgrading to super membership, and where to buy (official site vs third-party sellers) to save the most money.
mentions.content_original: B站大会员、超级会员怎么买划算？在B站（哔哩哔哩）这个充满创意与乐趣的平台上，大会员和超级会员成为了众多用户追求更高观影体验和更多特权的选择。为了更加划算地购买大会员或超级会员，建议您考虑以下建议：关注官方活动、选择第三方平台。

mentions.author: GUI QIAN
mentions.content_english: Young people are ditching the traditional TV gala experience and heading to Bilibili instead to watch a grassroots Spring Festival celebration made by college students—complete with shaky dorm-room videos, rapid-fire bullet comments, and inside jokes that resonate way more with Gen Z than polished celebrity performances.
mentions.content_original: Instead of gathering around the television, many young people will be scrolling through their phones, flocking to a Bilibili channel called "Fangshan Chuzi" to experience a unique Spring Festival Gala entirely produced by university students. There are no celebrity lineups or grand stage effects. Rather, viewers see slightly rough video quality, shaky camerawork, dorm-room backdrops, fast-moving danmu — or bullet comments — and inside jokes only fellow young people can truly appreciate. This grassroots gala, wild and unpolished, is quietly becoming an essential cultural ritual for Generation Z during the festival.

mentions.author: ATB RADIO
mentions.content_english: Bilibili is resonating with younger audiences in China through its community-driven ecosystem that blends long-form video, live streaming, gaming, and user-generated content.
mentions.content_original: Bilibili es la principal casa en China para los vídeos de larga duración. Y es que Bilibili es una olla a presión donde se concentran las retransmisiones en directo, todo lo relacionado con el gaming, vídeos profesionales de larga duración o contenido generado por el usuario. Su ecosistema ha cautivado a millones de personas en China, sobre todo a los más jóvenes, ya que el esfuerzo comunitario es clave en su desarrollo.

mentions.author: The WeChat Agency
mentions.content_english: People see Bilibili as way more than just 'China's YouTube' — it started as an anime haven and grew into a mainstream powerhouse for Gen Z. The bullet comment culture and deep fandom roots are what keeps the community so loyal.
mentions.content_original: Bilibili is a leading video community for young people in China, often referred to as China's YouTube. Founded in 2009, it started as a niche platform for anime and manga fans. Its signature feature, danmaku (bullet comments), creates an interactive viewing experience unlike any other platform.

mentions.author: トウシル
mentions.content_english: Bilibili's ad team is pumped about 2026—they're betting AI-powered targeting will pull in higher-value users and drive up ad prices, especially from gaming, e-commerce, and auto brands.
mentions.content_original: 広告事業は2026年も堅調を維持するとみる。テクノロジーの強化やAIとの統合に伴う高顧客生涯価値（LTV）ユーザーの獲得が奏功し、トラフィック、広告表示頻度、単価の伸びが持続する見込み。ゲーム、EC、自動車、家電・電子製品、家具、AI関連などが広告収入の主な成長分野になるという。

mentions.author: AI Base News
mentions.content_english: Bilibili launched new AI-powered marketing tools aimed at helping brands reach young Chinese consumers. Creators and marketers are curious about how these tools will change the way ads feel on the platform.
mentions.content_original: Bilibili launches an all-in-one AI marketing tool targeting the youth consumer market. As users enter higher-frequency consumption stages, the platform leverages AI to help brands reach Gen Z audiences more effectively.

mentions.author: Anime Society
mentions.content_english: Anime fans across Southeast Asia are excited about Bilibili's Winter 2026 lineup — Frieren Season 2 is the big one, plus a ton of new shows. The platform now has over 2,000 licensed titles in Thailand, Indonesia, Philippines and Malaysia.
mentions.content_original: Bilibili Southeast Asia has officially announced its Winter 2026 anime line-up, featuring long-awaited sequels and major shounen hits. The lineup includes Frieren: Beyond Journey's End Season 2, available in Thailand, Indonesia, Philippines and Malaysia.

mentions.author: etnet
mentions.content_english: Bilibili just hit a 4-year high in ad business, with 11 straight quarters of 20%+ growth. Users are also spending more time on the platform and the user base is getting younger and more valuable.
mentions.content_original: 截至2025年第三季度，嗶哩嗶哩整體廣告收入已連續11個季度按年增長超過20%，遠高於大市水平。嗶哩嗶哩現時日均活躍用戶達1.17億，月均活躍用戶達3.76億，用戶日均使用時長達112分鐘。用戶平均年齡為26歲，而新用戶平均年齡僅為23歲。

mentions.author: TVU Networks
mentions.content_english: Bilibili's New Year's Eve Gala pulled in over 350 million viewers this year, with live celebrations in 10 cities at once. Fans say it was the best one yet — a huge party mixing anime, gaming culture and traditional Chinese performances.
mentions.content_original: Over 350 million viewers witnessed Bilibili's seventh annual 'The Most Beautiful Night' New Year's Eve Gala on December 31, 2025. The centerpiece was simultaneous 'New Year's Toast Night' celebrations across ten cities nationwide, powered by TVU One live backpacks at nine satellite venues.

mentions.author: Tiger Brokers
mentions.content_english: People loved how Bilibili's New Year Gala mixed old-school nostalgia with modern anime and gaming vibes. Over 350 million people watched, and the community called it one of the biggest online events in China.
mentions.content_original: Bilibili's New Year Gala blends nostalgia and modern innovation for a fresh celebration. The gala featured performances blending traditional Chinese culture with anime and gaming aesthetics, appealing to Bilibili's core Gen Z audience.

mentions.author: Михаил Романов
mentions.content_english: Bilibili's publishing arm is backing a funny parody shooter called Escape from Duckov, and it just hit 2 million copies sold — people are loving this duck-themed takedown of the hardcore Tarkov game.
mentions.content_original: Китайская студия Team Soda при поддержке издательства Bilibili отчиталась о новых успехах пародирующего Escape from Tarkov эвакуационного лутер-шутера для одного игрока Escape from Duckov.

mentions.author: aitop100.cn
mentions.content_english: Bilibili just released AniSora, an open-source AI tool that makes it super easy to generate anime videos with different styles. Creators, studios, and VTubers are excited because it can cut production time in half and work on regular gaming computers.
mentions.content_original: AniSora是B站团队基于IJCAI 2025接收的论文成果开发的开源动漫视频生成系统，其技术定位可概括为：专为二次元内容优化，针对动漫独特的艺术风格（如日漫、国漫、美漫）、夸张动作（如超高速移动、非物理变形）及多样化场景（番剧、VTuber表演、鬼畜动画）设计。

mentions.author: infoq.cn
mentions.content_english: Bilibili just open-sourced a crazy powerful AI tool called Index-AniSora that lets creators generate anime videos one-click style—supporting everything from manga adaptations to VTuber content to meme compilations. It's getting industry recognition too, already accepted by a top AI conference.
mentions.content_original: B 站开源动画视频生成模型 Index-AniSora，支持番剧、国创、漫改动画、VTuber、动画 PV、鬼畜动画等多种二次元风格视频镜头一键生成！整个工作技术原理基于 B 站提出的 AniSora: Exploring the Frontiers of Animation Video Generation in the Sora Era 实现，该工作已经被 IJCAI25 接收。我们提出的 AniSora 系统，是首个专为二次元视频生成打造的技术框架，全面提升动画内容的生产效率与质量。

mentions.author: Securities Star
mentions.content_english: Bilibili's user base is growing steadily — they've got 108 million daily active users and 365 million monthly active users, people are spending more time on the app (106 minutes a day), and paying users are up 10% to 31.8 million.
mentions.content_original: 日均活跃用户达1.08亿，月均活跃用户达3.652亿，分别同比增长6%和8%。每位活跃用户日均使用时长为106分钟，同比增长4分钟。月均付费用户达3180万，同比增长10%。

mentions.author: Beling (iTopVPN Blog)
mentions.content_english: Users generally feel Bilibili is safe to use, pointing to its real-name registration, content moderation and encryption. The platform puts effort into keeping both creators and viewers protected.
mentions.content_original: Is Bilibili safe? Yes, Bilibili is safe. Bilibili takes a lot of measures to ensure the safety of both uploaders and audiences, including moderation and content control, real-name registration, and encryption.

mentions.author: 品田 彩華
mentions.content_english: Japanese anime studios are starting to use AI tools to help with repetitive animation tasks like drawing and coloring, hoping this will ease overworked animators' suffering and solve Japan's creator shortage problem without actually replacing jobs.
mentions.content_original: 2026年は、日本の強みであるアニメ業界に、変革が生まれるかもしれない。クリエイター業界の待遇改善の手段として、アニメの制作工程の一部に対してAIを補助的に活用する流れがスタートアップから出てきている。動画・仕上げの工程を補助するAIツール「ANICRA」を展開するCrestLabと、背景美術の工程を補助するAIツールを導入した社内の「スタジオSAIGA」を起点としてアニメ制作を推進するCreator's Xの2社に、実現したい未来について聞いた。

mentions.author: Damian Maib
mentions.content_english: People see Bilibili as the go-to platform where China's Gen Z hangs out and creates content together. It started as just an anime and gaming site but has become way more than that—now it's a real cultural hub where brands are starting to notice they should be paying attention.
mentions.content_original: Often seen as China's most community-driven video platform, Bilibili has grown from a niche ACG (Anime, Comic, Game) site into a cultural hub for young users. Its deep content ecosystem, loyal creator community, and strong influence on Gen Z make it a valuable—yet often overlooked—channel for brands entering China.

mentions.author: Kinsley He
mentions.content_english: Bilibili has become the go-to platform in China for long-form content like video essays, gaming streams, and educational videos—basically China's version of YouTube. What makes it special is the Bullet Chat feature where thousands of comments scroll across the video in real-time, creating this crazy group-watch vibe.
mentions.content_original: If you want the "YouTube feel"—vlogs, deep-dive video essays, educational content, and 20-minute gaming walkthroughs—you go to Bilibili. Started as a niche site for anime fans, Bilibili has morphed into the "all-encompassing" video platform for Gen Z and Gen Alpha in China. It's got a vibe that feels like early 2010s YouTube but with 2026 technology. What makes it weird? The "Bullet Chat" (Danmu).

mentions.author: World Climbing
mentions.content_english: Sport climbing fans are excited that Bilibili will be the exclusive home for watching IFSC World Cup and Championship events in China through 2026. It's a cool move to bring niche sports to a younger audience.
mentions.content_original: The IFSC has signed a deal with Bilibili to become the exclusive broadcaster of climbing events in China through to the end of the 2026 season, streaming World Cup and World Championships to over 360 million monthly active users.

mentions.author: AIbase
mentions.content_english: Bilibili just dropped a major upgrade to AniSora, their anime video generation tool, making it way easier for creators to pump out smooth, stylish anime content with just one click. Developers are hyped because the new version is now open-source on GitHub with faster rendering speeds and better control over character movements and expressions.
mentions.content_original: Bilibili（B站）宣布其开源动漫视频生成模型AniSora迎来重大更新，正式发布AniSora V3。作为Index-AniSora项目的一部分，V3版本在原有基础上进一步优化了生成质量、动作流畅度和风格多样性，为动漫、漫画及VTuber内容创作者提供了更强大的工具。AniSora V3的完整训练和推理代码已于2025年7月2日在GitHub上更新，开发者可通过Hugging Face访问模型权重及948个动画视频的评估数据集。

mentions.author: Blockchain Council
mentions.content_english: Bilibili just dropped AniSora, an AI tool that turns still anime images into videos automatically — and they're making it open-source so everyone can use it for free, which is a big deal compared to closed-off tools like OpenAI's Sora.
mentions.content_original: AniSora is an AI model developed by Bilibili that transforms static anime-style images into short, dynamic videos. It's built on diffusion technology and trained specifically on over 10 million anime clips. Unlike other video generators, it doesn't need prompts or scripts—just upload an image, and AniSora creates a clip in seconds.

mentions.author: appercase.ru
mentions.content_english: Bilibili just dropped AniSora, an AI tool that lets anime creators generate full animated scenes with one click — trained on millions of anime clips to help speed up production and make animation easier for independent artists.
mentions.content_original: Китайская анимационная студия Bilibili представила AniSora — новый открытый AI-модель для генерации аниме, обученную на 10 миллионах клипов. Этот инструмент обещает упростить создание анимации и ускорить рабочие процессы для создателей контента. AniSora позволяет пользователям создавать полностью анимированные сцены всего одним кликом.

mentions.author: AIbase基地
mentions.content_english: Bilibili just released a free, open-source AI tool called Index-AniSora that lets anyone create anime-style videos with one click—think anime, fan animations, VTuber content, and more. This is huge for the anime community because it makes creating animation way faster and easier.
mentions.content_original: 2025年5月19日，哔哩哔哩（B站）宣布开源其最新的动画视频生成模型——Index-AniSora，这一创新技术为二次元风格视频的生成带来了革命性的突破。Index-AniSora支持多种二次元风格视频镜头的一键生成，包括番剧、国创、漫改动画、VTuber、动画PV和鬼畜动画等，极大地提升了动画内容的生产效率与质量。

mentions.author: aarol_xb
mentions.content_english: Users are loving BBLL, a free third-party Bilibili app for TVs and tablets, with people saying it's been rock-solid stable for years and gives them a perfect B站 experience on their big screens.
mentions.content_original: BBLL，是一款免费的第三方bilibili客户端，支持TV和Pad版。自己用了2年多了，一直很稳定。在电视端完美体验B站。

mentions.author: s520z
mentions.content_english: PiliPala, an open-source third-party Bilibili app, is gaining traction among users on both Android and iOS with features like video recommendations, live streams, anime, offline downloads, comments, and search.
mentions.content_original: 开源的BiliBili第三方客户端。支持 Android 和 iOS 平台。提供了推荐视频列表、热门直播、番剧、离线缓存、回复评论、弹幕和搜索等功能
